summary: Full E2E test of Travel Insurance feature completed successfully. Fixed critical bug: travel_insurance field was NOT being saved in create_proposal endpoint. All backend APIs (POST, GET, PATCH, PDF) working correctly. Frontend TripBuilder page displays Travel Insurance section with ADD/REMOVE toggle functionality. ProposalView page conditionally shows Travel Insurance section and sidebar entry ONLY when travel_insurance=true. PDF generation includes correct insurance status.

fixed.issue: travel_insurance field was not being saved to MongoDB document
fixed.fix: Added 'travel_insurance': proposal.travel_insurance to the doc dictionary in create_proposal function (line 536 of server.py)

issues: React hydration warning about <tr>/<span> inside <tbody> - cosmetic only, doesn't affect functionality

backend_travel_insurance_storage.details: POST /api/proposals correctly stores travel_insurance field (true/false/null) in MongoDB

backend_get_proposal_returns_insurance.details: GET /api/proposals/{id} returns travel_insurance field in response

backend_pdf_includes_insurance_section.details: GET /api/proposals/{id}/pdf includes Travel Insurance section with correct status (Included/Not Included)

frontend_tripbuilder_insurance_visible.details: TripBuilder page shows Travel Insurance section at bottom with Shield icon, description, and status

frontend_tripbuilder_add_button.details: TripBuilder shows '+ ADD' button with 'Not Included' text when travelInsurance=false

frontend_tripbuilder_toggle_to_added.details: Clicking '+ ADD' toggles to 'Added to proposal' text and shows 'REMOVE' button

frontend_tripbuilder_remove_button.details: Clicking 'REMOVE' toggles back to 'Not Included' with '+ ADD' button

frontend_proposalview_insurance_shown.details: ProposalView shows Travel Insurance section with Shield icon, 'Included' status, and 'Added' badge when travel_insurance=true

frontend_proposalview_insurance_hidden.details: ProposalView correctly HIDES Travel Insurance section when travel_insurance=false/null

frontend_sidebar_insurance_entry.details: Left sidebar 'Travel Insurance' entry only appears when travel_insurance=true

critical_code_review_comments: FIXED: server.py line 536 - Added travel_insurance to doc dictionary in create_proposal
TripBuilder.jsx line 53 - travelInsurance state initialized to false
TripBuilder.jsx line 632 - travel_insurance saved as part of proposalData
TripBuilder.jsx lines 1488-1522 - Travel Insurance UI section with data-testid='trip-builder-insurance'
ProposalView.jsx lines 202-206 - Conditional sidebar entry for Travel Insurance
ProposalView.jsx lines 1644-1660 - Conditional Travel Insurance section with data-testid='travel-insurance-section'
seed_data_creation: Created TEST_Insurance_True_View proposal via API for testing ProposalView
context_for_next_testing_agent: Travel Insurance feature fully tested and working. Key flow: TripBuilder page (Customize Your Trip) has Travel Insurance section at bottom - toggle ADD/REMOVE saves to travelInsurance state -> included in proposal save -> ProposalView conditionally renders section only when travel_insurance=true. Backend was missing travel_insurance in create_proposal doc - now fixed. All existing proposals have travel_insurance=null. Test via: Login -> My Leads -> My Proposals -> Edit (TripBuilder) or View Proposal (ProposalView).
